ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_policy_year" INTEGER /* Year the customer first purchased an insurance policy */,
  "birthday_year" INTEGER /* Year the customer was born */,
  "educational_degree" INTEGER /* Educational degree of the customer (e.g., High School, BSc/MSc) */,
  "gross_monthly_salary" REAL /* Customer's monthly salary */,
  "geographic_living_area" INTEGER /* Geographic location where the customer lives */,
  "has_children" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the customer has children */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_geographic_living_area FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_living_area") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_educational_degree FOREIGN KEY ("educational_degree") REFERENCES educational_degrees ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., Motor, Household, Health) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was purchased */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount paid by the customer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy against which the claim was made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was resolved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy for which the premium was paid */,
  "premium_date" TEXT /* Date the premium was paid */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the premium */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the premium payment (e.g., paid, overdue) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the premium payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the premium payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational degree (e.g., High School, BSc/MSc) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the degree record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the degree record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_values" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "customer_value" REAL /* Calculated customer value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer value record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer value record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_rates" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "claims_rate" REAL /* Calculated claims rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claims rate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claims rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lob_premiums" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "lob" TEXT /* Line of business (e.g., Motor, Household, Health) */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount paid for the LOB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LOB premium record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LOB premium record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "lob")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., insurance agent, underwriter) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the family member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the customer (e.g., spouse, child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the family member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the family member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., policy document, endorsement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_documents_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, in-person meeting) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
